seoTitle: How to Get a Phone Number on GoHighLevel Easily
metaDescription: Learn how to acquire and configure a phone number in GoHighLevel to strengthen customer communication and support your marketing campaigns.
intro: A dedicated phone number in GoHighLevel gives your business a direct line for calls and texts, helping you connect with clients without relying on a personal number. This guide covers navigating the platform, acquiring your number, and configuring it for best use. It's aimed at marketers, small business owners, and entrepreneurs who want to strengthen customer communication as part of a broader campaign strategy.

steps.heading: Navigate the GoHighLevel interface
steps.body: Find your way to the settings area where phone and communication features are managed within your GoHighLevel account.

steps.heading: Acquire your phone number
steps.body: Follow the prompts to select and set up a new phone number tied to your account for calls and texting.

steps.heading: Configure your number's settings
steps.body: Adjust the configuration options for your number to match how you plan to use it, whether for outbound calls, texts, or both.

steps.heading: Apply best practices for customer communication
steps.body: Once set up, use your number consistently for client-facing communication so contacts have a single, reliable way to reach you.

steps.heading: Leverage automation for efficient operations
steps.body: Combine your new phone number with GoHighLevel's automation tools, such as automated responses and follow-up scheduling, to keep communication timely.

faq.question: Can I use my new GoHighLevel phone number for both calls and texts?
faq.answer: Yes, numbers set up through GoHighLevel are generally configured to support both voice calls and text messaging.

faq.question: Does getting a phone number in GoHighLevel replace my personal number?
faq.answer: It gives you a dedicated business line, which many users prefer to keep separate from their personal phone number.

faq.question: Can automated responses be set up on my new number?
faq.answer: Yes, GoHighLevel's automation tools can be connected to your phone number to handle scheduled follow-ups and automated messaging.

faq.question: Is this feature useful for solo entrepreneurs, or just larger teams?
faq.answer: It's useful for both, since even solo entrepreneurs benefit from having a dedicated, professional communication channel.

faq.question: What if I need to change my number's configuration later?
faq.answer: You can return to the settings area within GoHighLevel to update your number's configuration as your communication needs change.
